positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a crescent moon cradling a constellation of whimsical, geometric woodland animals (fox, rabbit, owl, badger). The style should be elegant, inspired by Scandinavian folk art and mid-century modern design. Use a limited, harmonious palette of deep indigo blue, warm ochre yellow, forest emerald green, and muted cream. The animals should be depicted in stylized silhouettes with crisp, clean lines and negative space definition. Composition must be centered and balanced, designed to be printed cleanly on fabric. Perfect for screen printing or DTG transfer. High contrast, clean vector quality, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blur, grainy, messy lines, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, cartoonish, complex background, photographic, realism, chromatic aberration
